sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42490" key="*)erinuw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἐρῑνῠώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n42490.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐρινύες,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.458c</biblScope> </bibl> ; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συκοφαντίαι</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">602e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
